sample_sentences: purifying your information network, only being exposed to the highest quality info, makes scaling + density meaningful, solving our dillema.
the fake and dangerous metric of business, it can make you feel youve done a lot when in fact you did nothing.
It hides your inneficiencies, it allows in subtle distractions that actually don't take you where you want to go
massive correlation between state of mind and performance.

If something is eating your brain in your life, like the situation of managing emotional stuff we had, that made you slow on the track, and the power that comes when one has a clean consciousness, it allows you to place all focus on the present, unapologetically

in your search for knowledge and information for the lack of a better term (you are doing something unprecedented) knowing where to go fast and where to slow down in this space becomes crutial through the exploration/exploitation lens.
I sometimes cant even contain myself from what I am and what Im gonna do.
a great advantage in searching the space of information is timing and selective memory
I own my greatest and most ambitious project, I am my own startup, my marketing target, life itself
You are painting your life, you must choose where to leave your mark, painting where others havent.
Sometimes it's a rat race to see who gets a spot in a thin funnel.
play the game, but know when to rise above it
this project we are on, with the digital setup for example, is about scaling you, you at scale
this mechanism or tokenizing ideas and concepts is dominated by AI and in the age of the dead internet all kinds of concepts you like will be neatly expressed by AI.

To go beyond this tho you go to the source, you interact human to human precisely to get the nonsensical, the wrong, the gap, the absurd, the substrate and not its dillution, those slow parts in books you don't understand
offloading your brain, writing down the ideas as you are about to sleep.

It synergizes with that thing of planning the day of tommorow and now you are ready to sleep, you are ready to wake up to it
earning sleep through the necessity of physical and mental adaptation, integration and overcoming
also most notes Ive taken as im about to sleep I dont understand what is written
and I wonder, how many out there are doing exactly this

you gotta face the possibility of wasted time and infinite loss, then by being afraid do you perceive its value
thinking for example that there is no more time for you to read books.
The story is written.
